summary: Tested Post-Enrollment Actions on Enrollment Review page. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend tests passed. The 3 Post-Enrollment Action cards render correctly: Send to Payroll (generates Excel), Send to Insurance (generates Excel), IRS Offer Codes (auto-update). File downloads work correctly for payroll deductions and carrier census. PDF proof download works. Navigation to IRS Forms page works.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/enrollment/payroll-summary/{employer_id} returns 200 with enrolled_count, total_ee_deductions, total_er_contributions, carriers
Backend: GET /api/enrollment/payroll-export/{employer_id} returns Excel file (.xlsx) with correct headers
Backend: GET /api/enrollment/carrier-export/{employer_id} returns Excel file (.xlsx) with correct headers
Backend: GET /api/enrollment/carrier-export/{employer_id}?carrier=Blue%20Cross filters by carrier
Backend: GET /api/enrollment/review/{employer_id} returns total_enrollments, enrolled, declined, pending_approval counts
Backend: Enrollment data structure has employee_name, status, plan_name, coverage_tier, approved fields
Backend: GET /api/enrollment/review/{employer_id}/proof/{enrollment_id} returns PDF file
Backend: Invalid enrollment ID returns 404 for proof endpoint
Backend: GET /api/enrollment/eligibility/{employer_id} returns total, eligible, ineligible, results
Backend: Eligibility results have employee_name, weekly_hours, annual_salary, eligible, offer_code fields
Frontend: Enrollment Review page loads with Eligibility and Enrollments tabs
Frontend: 3 Post-Enrollment Action cards render (Send to Payroll, Send to Insurance, IRS Offer Codes)
Frontend: Send to Payroll card shows Employee Deductions ($180/mo) and Employer Contributions ($350/mo)
Frontend: Send to Insurance card shows Enrolled Members (1) and Blue Cross carrier
Frontend: IRS Offer Codes card shows 'Auto-Updated' with 'Live' badge
Frontend: Send to Payroll button triggers Excel download
Frontend: Download Carrier Census button triggers Excel download with toast 'Carrier census downloaded!'
Frontend: View IRS Forms button navigates to /irs-forms page
Frontend: Enrollment table shows 2 rows (Adam Murphy - Enrolled, David Chen - Declined)
Frontend: Download proof buttons work (2 buttons visible)
Frontend: Eligibility tab shows 60 employees (47 eligible, 13 ineligible)
Frontend: Eligibility table shows Employee, Status, Hours/Wk, Salary, Affordable, Offer Code columns
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing enrollments: Adam Murphy (enrolled - Silver PPO) and David Chen (declined - spouse coverage)

mocked_apis_list: ADP Payroll API - sandbox mode (payroll export generates local Excel, not sent to real ADP)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Post-Enrollment Actions fully tested and working. Key findings: 1) payroll-summary endpoint returns enrolled_count=1, total_ee_deductions=$180, total_er_contributions=$350, carriers=['Blue Cross']. 2) payroll-export generates ADP-compatible Excel with columns: Employee ID, Name, Email, Plan Name, Carrier, Coverage Tier, Deduction Type, Deduction Amount, Employer Contribution, Total Premium, Effective Date, Frequency, Pre-Tax. 3) carrier-export generates carrier census Excel with columns: SSN (Last 4), Employee Name, DOB, Plan Name, Coverage Tier, Effective Date, Employee Premium, Employer Contribution, Total Premium, Dependents. 4) proof endpoint generates PDF with enrollment/decline details. 5) IRS Offer Codes auto-update when employees accept/decline coverage (via _recalculate_offer_code function). 6) Eligibility tab shows 60 employees with offer codes (1H for no plan, 1B for employee-only coverage).
